Fuzhou & Functional transfer & Evidence not separately mechanism-coded in the current pilot table. & Evidence not separately mechanism-coded in the current pilot table. & Formal no-government-financing language coexists with a major reorganization of public-project finance. The issuer remains a leading Fuzhou infrastructure, shantytown-renovation, affordable-housing, municipal entrusted construction , and area-development platform, but the prospectus documents that after 2011 municipal project funding shifted from issuer financing with fiscal repayment to full fiscal appropriation and management-fee settlement. PPP projects, government-purchase-service projects that were later adjusted, fiscal subsidies, government receivables, and rating evidence of continuing fiscal support all point to functional transfer rather than substantive disappearance. \\
Fuzhou & Functional transfer & Evidence not separately mechanism-coded in the current pilot table. & Evidence not separately mechanism-coded in the current pilot table. & The same legal issuer was converted from a development-oriented state-owned assets investment group into a state-capital investment and operation platform. Direct urban infrastructure and area-development language disappeared from the issuer business scope, while municipal infrastructure functions continued through equity stakes in Fuzhou Chengtou, Fuzhou Zuohai, and other city platforms and through the Mindu infrastructure fund. This is a transfer into portfolio and fund channels rather than substantive disappearance. \\

Hangzhou & Functional transfer & Debt succession and asset transfer occurred through formal reorganization. & Qiantou transfer, city-investment consolidation, and Anju creation link multiple municipal entities. & Public project and housing functions moved within the municipal platform system. \\
